narrative:
Trenton 5 (precinct in Butler County) has 558 registered voters, with 68.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a modest Republican lean of 5.7 percentage points.
